title: Niko's 3D Crafting Table
description: Gives the crafting table a 3D model while keeping a vanilla look.
body:
This resource pack adds a 3D model for the crafting table while still having a vanilla look.![GIF of 3D rotating crafting table ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f2e8f963d7eb3c1f6378c88d6dafb64194a14bc2.gif)
  
¡thanks for using my pack!

  
<details>
<summary>License</summary>

you're free to do anything you want with this pack as long as you give me credit 😉

</details>
